name: gaia-codex
description: Use Codex with Gaia project-bound MCP, OAuth login, and live project patch discipline.

interface.shortDescription: Work on Gaia projects from Codex through OAuth-backed MCP.
interface.longDescription: Gaia Codex gives Codex a reusable workflow for project-bound Gaia MCP. It helps Codex read the bound project, preview patches, use project-scoped tools, and keep live Gaia changes tied to the intended project.
defaultPrompt: Connect this repository to its Gaia project.
Read the live Gaia project spec and compare it with my export.
Preview a Gaia project patch before applying it.
